hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ]; then /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.cmd" autoload-superra; else printf '{}\n'; fi
root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ]; then /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.cmd" merge-guard; else printf '{}\n'; fi
export SUPERRA_TASK_HOOK_EMPTY_JSON=1; root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ]; then /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.cmd" task-hook; else printf '{}\n'; fi
export SUPERRA_TASK_HOOK_EMPTY_JSON=1; root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ]; then /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.cmd" task-hook; else printf '{}\n'; fi
root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ]; then /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.cmd" codex-plan-stop; else printf '{}\n'; fi
